Registry / Terms / legal metrology

legal metrology

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00183 · 6 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #1.2view ↗

part of metrology relating to activities which result from statutory requirements and concern measurement, units of measurement, measuring instruments and methods of measurement and which are performed by competent bodies

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #1.2
    part of metrology relating to activities which result from statutory requirements and concern measurement, units of measurement, measuring instruments and methods of measurement and which are performed by competent bodies

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #1.01). Definition may differ from VIML 2000.
  2. MEDIUM 5 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 3 partially diverge.
